Onboarding flow

Merchant Requirements

Below are the requirements that a merchant has to submit

Onboarding

Category

Requirements

Indonesian Individual

  1. KTP/Passport/KITAS

  2. PIC Name

  3. PIC Phone Number

  4. Website/apps/Socmed

Indonesian Entity

  1. Deed of Establishment and Deed of Amendment

  2. SK Menkeh

  3. Company NPWP

  4. ID Card/KTP/Passport

  5. PIC Name

  6. PIC Phone Number

  7. Website/apps/Socmed

Foreign Entity

  1. Director’s Passport/KITAS (Foreign Entity that submit KITAS will get both JumpApp & QRIS, otherwise, merchant will only get JumpApp)

  2. Business address in Indonesia (For merchant that does not have office in Indonesia may use Xendit’s address & Xendit's NPWP number)

  3. Tax Business ID (For merchant that does not have Tax ID, may use Xendit's NPWP number)

  4. PIC Name

  5. PIC phone number

  6. Website/apps/Socmed

Note :

for Director Kitas, MO should make sure we fill in the NIORA (Nomor Induk Orang Asing) number not Permit Number

Category

Requirements

Website Requirements

  1. No Personal Social Media, No Marketplace, No E-commerce

  2. If a website, website must be active and fully running, meaning:

    1. Link is accessible

    2. Show product/ service

    3. Price in IDR

    4. Not a template or “coming soon” website

  3. If merchant submit Apps, must be listed in PlayStore / AppStore

  4. Merchant who provide business socmed, will not able to get cashback promo from Shopeepay

  5. 1 entity is allowed to apply more than 1 product/brand as long as each brand has their own outlet name and their own website (cannot use same website and outlet name for more than 1 brand)

Activation SLA

ShopeePay activated in 14 working days from the date merchant submits complete requirements to MO

[2026 Flow] Shopeepay Onboarding Steps

Category

Steps

Action

Process Owner

Merchant applies Shopeepay

1

Merchant submits Shopeepay application from their Dashboard

Merchant

MO Process Merchant’s Application (V3 merchant)

2

Open Admin Dashboard → “Channel Approval and Activations” → make sure Region Chosen is ID → Channel : Shopeepay → Apply Filter

Adjust Status or can click X to select all status

3

There are few status for merchant

If merchant status is Awaiting Partner Submission → merchant ready to submit to partner

If merchant status is New Submission → merchant need to be reviewed by MO

4

For merchant with status New Submission → Click View Details → New tab will be opened

5

For missing requirements on Website and/or Payment Flow, MO can directly use the Action Button

Action → Request Resubmission

Click +Request Additional Document → Choose Reason → Send Resubmission Request

Status will be automatically changed to Waiting for Merchant Resubmission and Merchant need to submit via Merchant Dashboard.

Once merchant submit, Status will changed to New Submission and documents or website will be stored on dedicated field

6

If merchant passed, Click Action → Approve → Status will changed to Awaiting Partner Submission

7

Once we are done review all merchant, on Channel Approval and Activations tab click action and choose Export and Update Status

Choose ID Shopeepay and custom the date (adjust the date)

8

Pop up message will appear and redirect us to exported_files, open the latest date file

9

Open tab APP - Merchant Regist and APP - Outlet Regist only

10

Copy paste to Merchant Registration Form

APP - Merchant Regist → Merchant Registration

APP - Outlet Regist → Outlet Registration

If the cell got coloured, it means it needs to be revised.

V2 Merchant

11

If an old merchant (V2 merchant) apply for SPP, they will have old UI. One of the characteristic is Entity type and Country of Incorporation is blank.

12

Click View Details and review

13a

IF we ever need to request for other missing part of documents please kindly use this sheet (Email Self-Serve)

*) Email will be sent automatically through Zapier

How to fill the sheet :

  • Merchant name : fill with merchant business/legal name

  • Merchant business email : fill with merchant’s email

  • CC alternative email merchant : fill with merchant’s other email (if any)

  • CC sales : fill with Xendit sales PIC

  • CC 1 : fill with email (can be Xendit’s/merchant’s)

  • Details : fill by choosing the dropdown list based on missing requirements

  • Message : leave it blank (will be auto generated when we have chosen the details)

  • Send an email? : fill with ✔ if the data filled are correct

Once merchant replied our email :

  • There will be a notification in #ca-email-notification Slack Channel

  • MO agent on QA shift will tag agent on Shopeepay shift

  • Agent on Shopeepay Shift will check the email

    • If merchant already fulfill the requirement, MO will continue to process the registration to Shopeepay

    • If a merchant is still missing the requirement, an Agent on Shopeepay shift will reply to the merchant's email.

13b

If merchant passed, Changed Status on Merchant Ops Box and choose awaiting_feedback_from_shopee

14

Once we are done review all merchant, on Channel Approval and Activations tab click action and choose Export

Choose ID Shopeepay and Status (OLD) Awaiting Feedback From Shopee and choose Today

15

Follow step 8 - 10

16

MO email Shopeepay team to info the Registration along with additional docs such as payment flow, migration letter, etc

Recipients

to: Suci Melyani <suci.melyani@shopeepay.com>

cc: Adya Jatiningrum <adyanti.jatiningrum@shopeepay.com>,

pramuda.wardani@shopeepay.com,

rizka.adriani@shopeepay.com,

Xendit MerchantOps <merchantops@xendit.co>

17a

For Activation, please kindly refer to [Xendit Online] ShopeePay Merchant Registration Tracker - 2024

Check column J - "KYC Status" → If status is Approved - check merchant on Channel Approval and Activations and click Activate

17b

Check column J - "KYC Status" → If status is rejected, check column K-"KYCRemark" → kindly follow up with the merchant if additional docs are needed

IF we ever need to request for other missing part of documents please kindly use this sheet (Email Self-Serve)

How to fill the sheet :

  • Merchant name : fill with merchant business/legal name

  • Merchant business email : fill with merchant’s email

  • CC alternative email merchant : fill with merchant’s other email (if any)

MO

6

Then, MO will process the new_submission merchants with ✅ icon in website check field

MO

7

Keep merchant’s status as new_submission because it will be automatically updated to awaiting_feedback_from_shopee when we generate the sheets. Address details will be automatically fetched when we generate the sheet, so we can leave as blank

MO

8

Click the “Generate Sheet” button, then choose the date (based on merchant submission’s date). Only merchants with “new_submission” status that will be exported to the sheets

MO

9

MO will need to copy-paste the generated data to [EFFECTIVE 15 NOVEMBER 2024] UPDATE FORM ISV - Merchant Registration Form .xlsx


And just need to submit JumpApp only (no need to submit QRIS part)

MO

10

ShopeePay Rate

To determine ShopeePay JumpApp and QRIS rate:

  1. QRIS rate

  • Mikro merchants: 0.3%

  • Regular merchants (kecil/besar/menengah): 0.7%

  • Education merchants (school, university): 0.6%

  • Donations & Charity: 0%

  • Fuel: 0.4%

  1. JumpApp rate - please map Xendit’s Industry to ShopeePay’s based on [EFFECTIVE 15 NOVEMBER 2024] UPDATE FORM ISV - Merchant Registration Form .xlsx - Sheet Merchant Category

  • Digital Merchants: chose service Industry as “Entertainment” with JumpApp rate 4%

  • Non-digital merchants: chose service Industry in reference to the sheet with JumpApp rate 2%

10 c

Manual Adjustment for JumpApp Rate

  1. ShopeePay rates in CA Dashboard will be automatically updated based on Industry Type’s question that we answered on OM Dashboard.

    OM Dashboard
    - If Digital = merchant will get 4% in CA Dashboard
    - If Non-Digital = merchant will get 2% in CA Dashboard

  1. Due to the Industry Mapping in ShopeePay ([NEW] Adjustment table Shopeepay- Sheet Category 2) is differs with Xendit’s, there were instances where MO had to make manual adjustment for the billing rates:

  2. Go to CA Dashboard > Click Details > Edit

  3. Click Edit Industry based on SPP’s Industry

  1. Update the billing rates manually

  2. Unchecked the “Automatically calculate MDR” toggle - this is to break connection between digital/non-digital questions with OM Dashboard (point 1 above)

  1. Please double check the rate for JumpApp and QRIS on the ShopeePay sheet before sending the submission to SPP

12

For Activation, please kindly refer to [Xendit Online] ShopeePay Merchant Registration Tracker - 2024 - Sheet “Registration Process”. Check for column H - KYC Status. If status = “Approved” for JumpApp, please proceed for activation manually from Dashboard

For those with “Rejected” status, kindly follow up with the merchant if additional docs are needed.

Manual activation from Dashboard:

  1. Click Edit

  1. Click Activate

  1. Voilà, merchant’s ShopeePay is now activated

17

Activated Merchants will get the notification email which automatically sends from our system.

MO, Merchant

18

Double check billing rates

Shopeepay team will then approve/revise the MDR in the sheet and we’ll activate according to their approved rates.

Upon activation, please recheck with the rates in CM as below:

  • Non-digital customers - 1.8018%

  • Digital customers - 3.6036%


MO

Notes from Shopeepay

Shopeepay Notes

Meaning

Next Step

On queue

Merchant’s application is being processed by the Shopeepay Team.

If the process exceeds the SLA, our system will automatically send the SLA Reminder to the SPP team.

Url inaccessible

Merchant’s website inaccessible

MO to double check the url submitted in Shopeepay registration sheets.

  • If accessible : info Shopeepay Team in WAG 

  • If inaccessible : ask merchant to provide another website using this sheets

Please input info for login detail

Merchant’s website needs credentials to login

MO to double check the url submitted in Shopeepay registration sheets to make sure regarding Shopeepay’s notes.

  • If accessible : info Shopeepay Team in WAG

  • If website needs credentials : ask merchant to provide a dummy account via email

Already live in another PG

Merchant already lives in another PG and needs to submit a migration letter.

  • MO ask merchant to provide the migration letter via email

  • Once merchant replied MO’s email, MO have to forward the migration letter to Shopeepay team via email

Please confirm payment flow

Need further details regarding payment flow from merchant’s website

  • MO to ask payment flow from merchant’s website via email

  • Once merchant replied MO’s email, MO has to forward the payment flow through WAG

FRAUD KTP

Merchant KTP indicated as fraud by Shopeepay Team

MO to offboard merchant from Xendit

Edge cases

Category

Case

Next Step

Edge case

Change Logo

Example

  • Merchant requested to change logo

  • MO request to Shopeepay for logo change

  • Once done, it should be reflected on merchant’s end

*) no change needed from Xendit’s side. No need to ask digipay to change logo

Edge case

Change Outlet Name

  • Merchant sends an email to MO (merchantops@xendit.co) requesting the changes.

  • MO informs AM about the request

  • AM fills and signs new form effective 26 July 2022 FORM PERUBAHAN DATA MERCHANT ShopeePay 26 Jul 2022.xlsx Shopeepay

  • to add, merchantops will send the form to Shopeepay (SLA will take 14 days)

  • Once SPP inform the process is completed, MO will have to change name via OM - Change Name feature for Shipeepay. And please also update the merchant name in CM

Edge case

Website need payment flow

  • Every merchant that register in Shopeepay payment channel, website should have payment flow

  • If no payment flow in website, MO have to make sure to AM/Sales before submit to Shopeepay Team

  • If MO already submit the BID and Shopeepay Team ask about payment flow, MO can ask AM/Sales then put the feedback here

Edge Case

Request ShopeePayLater Activation

  • Merchant request to Sales/AM/CS once channel has been activated

  • Note that SPayLater only for merchants that already had QRIS and could transaction using Website platform

  • ShopeePay will process SPayLater only in the beginning of the month

  • MO send an email to ShopeePay asking to activate SPayLater to : adyanti.jatiningrum@shopee.com, pramuda.wardani@shopee.com, rizka.adriani@shopee.com

And informed below details :

  1. QRIS MID

  2. App MID

  3. Internal MID, SID & NMID (available on ShopeePay sheet under Additional Info QRIS tab)

  • MO wait for feedback, once got feedback from ShopeePay please informed Julie (Jugu) for activation on Xendit’s side

Troubleshooting

Merchant KTP indicate as fraud by Shopeepay Team

  • MO offboard merchant from Xendit

  • https://xendit.slack.com/archives/CHL089LRH/p1624431377191400?thread_ts=1622113761.165300&cid=CHL089LRH

  • https://xendit.slack.com/archives/CHL089LRH/p1623846206053100?thread_ts=1622113761.165300&cid=CHL089LRH

Troubleshooting

Merchant KTP indicated as fraud by Shopeepay Team : How to explain to Merchant?

  • MO can ask CS or AM info merchant to directly contact Shopeepay PIC by email
     

Change MID Request

  • Merchant willing to use their old MID’s for their end-user related to here

  • CS/AM/Sales will request the change MID request to #partnerships-request

  • SPP Partnership PIC will be review the use case and reason on why merchant need to change their MID

    • Parallel merchant need to filled the detail change SPP form here

  • After partnership approved, MO will help to execute the onboarding along with change request form that already filled and sign by merchant via email

  • MO will help to disable the existing MID via retool

  • ShopeePay give feedback approval to MO via email

  • MO will do change MID via retool

    • MO can choose Payment Setting

    • Put the BID

    • Choose the e-wallet and the click Next

    • Click pencil icon on ShopeePay row

    • MO will see the pop up edit modal and click next again

    • Change the SPP external MID and SID that already approved by ShopeePay

    • Click Next

    • MO will see another pop up log preview

    • Then click Submit
